name: BTC Value Reacceptance Exhaustion v1
edge_mechanism: mean reversion from exhaustion only after price reaccepts prior value
thesis: BTC 1h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for a value reacceptance exhaustion setup that waits for structure to re-enter prior balance before fading the move. The edge should come from exhaustion repair, not blind oversold catching.
invalidation_condition: Abort if reacceptance-exhaustion setups are too sparse, if reaccepted moves do not travel back into value after costs, or if exhaustion signals keep appearing in genuine continuation trends.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price stretches away from value, then reaccepts prior balance and mean-reverts far enough to monetize the exhaustion repair.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: In chop-heavy intraday conditions, stretched moves often fail once value is reaccepted. BTC is a clean lane to test that without alt noise.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: BTC 1h is suitable because value reacceptance is easier to read on a liquid major and should still provide enough signal density.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the market is more trend-persistent than it looks, exhaustion signals will keep fading valid continuation.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If reacceptance is correct but repair travel is short, shorten exits before adding more restrictive filters.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: Repeated short-hold exhaustion repairs with front-half harvesting doing most of the expectancy.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: BTC 1h and at least one cross-lane show credible density and positive post-cost value-repair behavior.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, too-sparse output, or repeated reacceptance signals that fail to move enough after entry.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; exhaustion and reacceptance are sequential
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by broad reacceptance rules rather than exact reversal candle requirements

test_lanes.why_included: Cleanest lane for value reacceptance mean reversion in the current basket.
test_lanes.continue_if: Reacceptance-exhaustion entries show enough density and positive repair travel.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: Signals are too sparse or keep fading real trends.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: A reasonable number of exhaustion repairs back into balance.

test_lanes.why_included: Checks whether the mechanism transfers to the basket primary lane.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Slightly noisier but still tradable exhaustion repairs.

test_lanes.why_included: Tests whether the same logic can survive on a higher-beta lane.
test_lanes.continue_if: AXS preserves the mechanism without becoming churn.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Fewer but larger exhaustion repair moves than majors.
